summary: Implements Force Regimen activation using the Force Power execution model, adds Logic Upgrade: Skill Swap as a progression choice, and reclassifies Resilient Talent as GM-managed.
implemented: Force Regimen cards now open a Force-style UTF roll dialog before use.

Force RegimenExecutor rolls Use the Force, resolves the best DC tier, posts a Force-style chat card, marks the regimen spent/discarded, and creates an active regimen effect containing the resolved tier.
Active Force Regimens still clear on long rest or End Effect.
Logic Upgrade: Skill Swap now prompts during feat selection for one untrained non-Use the Force skill.
Derived skill totals treat the selected Logic Upgrade: Skill Swap skill as trained.
puntedOrDeferred: Resilient Talent is marked GM-managed because temporary talent choice and expiry are better handled by the GM until a dedicated temporary-talent subsystem exists.
Force Regimen structured benefits are recorded on the active effect but not fully auto-applied to every roll/defense context yet.
